description: Letter addressed to Bū l-F[aḍl] Shela b. Maṣliaḥ. In Judaeo-Arabic. Fragment. Mentions receiving the addressee's letter sent with 'the teacher' (al-melammed); "dogs" and people who are "hungry and naked." (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב אל שלא בן מצליח בעניין 'כלבים' ואנשים 'רעבים וערומים'
